references.hebrew: וְנָחֲךָ֣ יְהֹוָה֮ תָּמִיד֒ וְהִשְׂבִּ֤יעַ בְּצַחְצָחוֹת֙ נַפְשֶׁ֔ךָ וְעַצְמֹתֶ֖יךָ יַחֲלִ֑יץ וְהָיִ֙יתָ֙ כְּגַ֣ן רָוֶ֔ה וּכְמוֹצָ֣א מַ֔יִם אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־יְכַזְּב֖וּ מֵימָֽיו׃
references.english:
GOD will guide you always—
Slaking your thirst in parched placeseparched places Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
And giving strength to your bones.
You shall be like a watered garden,
Like a spring whose waters do not fail.

references.hebrew: וַיְדַבֵּ֤ר מֹשֶׁה֙ אֶל־הָעָ֣ם לֵאמֹ֔ר הֵחָלְצ֧וּ מֵאִתְּכֶ֛ם אֲנָשִׁ֖ים לַצָּבָ֑א וְיִהְיוּ֙ עַל־מִדְיָ֔ן לָתֵ֥ת נִקְמַת־יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּמִדְיָֽן׃
references.english: Moses spoke to the people,athe people Or its leaders, on the people’s behalf. saying, “Let troops be picked out from among you for a campaign, and let them fall upon Midian to wreak GOD’s vengeance on Midian.

commentary_links.hebrew: יְחַלֵּ֣ץ עָנִ֣י בְעׇנְי֑וֹ וְיִ֖גֶל בַּלַּ֣חַץ אׇזְנָֽם׃
commentary_links.english:
Rescuing the lowly from their affliction,
[God] opens their understanding through distress.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: שלופי מביתא לק רבא &star והכתיב יחלץ עני

commentary_links.english:
ח The angel of GOD camps around those who show awe,
and rescues them.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ליראיו ויחלצם בשכר יראיו יחלצם מדינה של גיהנם &star אלא הא דכתיב

commentary_links.hebrew: בְּצֹאנָ֣ם וּבִבְקָרָ֗ם יֵ֥לְכ֛וּ לְבַקֵּ֥שׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֣א יִמְצָ֑אוּ חָלַ֖ץ מֵהֶֽם׃
commentary_links.english:
Then they will go with their sheep and cattle
To seek GOD—whom they will not find.dIsrael’s pride … will not find This passage would read well after 5.15; cf. 5.6 with 6.6.
They have been cast off:eThey have been cast off Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: גמליאל עמא דחלץ ליה מריה מיניה דכתיב בצאנם ובבקרם ילכו לבקש את

commentary_links.hebrew: וָאַלְבִּישֵׁ֣ךְ רִקְמָ֔ה וָאֶנְעֲלֵ֖ךְ תָּ֑חַשׁ וָאֶחְבְּשֵׁ֣ךְ בַּשֵּׁ֔שׁ וַאֲכַסֵּ֖ךְ מֶֽשִׁי׃
commentary_links.english: I clothed you with embroidered garments, and gave you sandals of dolphin leatheredolphin leather Or leather of a certain dyed hue. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. to wear, and wound fine linen about your head, and dressed you in silks.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ביה ואנעלך תחש אי הכי כולו של שער

commentary_links.hebrew: וְצִוָּה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְחִלְּצוּ֙ אֶת־הָ֣אֲבָנִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּהֵ֖ן הַנָּ֑גַע וְהִשְׁלִ֤יכוּ אֶתְהֶן֙ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לָעִ֔יר אֶל־מָק֖וֹם טָמֵֽא׃
commentary_links.english: the priest shall order the stones with the plague in them to be pulled out and cast outside the city into an impure place.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אשר בהן הנגע &star ואימא זרוזי הוא דכתיב

commentary_links.hebrew: וְנִגְּשָׁ֨ה יְבִמְתּ֣וֹ אֵלָיו֮ לְעֵינֵ֣י הַזְּקֵנִים֒ וְחָלְצָ֤ה נַעֲלוֹ֙ מֵעַ֣ל רַגְל֔וֹ וְיָרְקָ֖ה בְּפָנָ֑יו וְעָֽנְתָה֙ וְאָ֣מְרָ֔ה כָּ֚כָה יֵעָשֶׂ֣ה לָאִ֔ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־יִבְנֶ֖ה אֶת־בֵּ֥ית אָחִֽיו׃
commentary_links.english: his brother’s widow shall go up to him in the presence of the elders, pull the sandal off his foot, spit in his face, and make this declaration: Thus shall be done to the man who will not build up his brother’s house!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לשמואל ממאי דהאי וחלצה נעלו מעל
